title: My One-Week Weather Diary (For Science Class)

sentences.en: Our science teacher gave us a special homework project this week: keep a daily weather diary for seven days straight.
sentences.zh: 我們的自然老師這星期出了一個特別的作業：連續七天寫一本每日天氣日記。

sentences.en: Monday's weather was simple: sunny all day, warm but not too hot, with a light wind from the east.
sentences.zh: 星期一的天氣很單純：整天都是晴天，溫暖但不會太熱，有一陣從東邊吹來的微風。

sentences.en: Tuesday started sunny too, but by the afternoon, thick gray clouds moved in from the north and it suddenly got much cooler.
sentences.zh: 星期二一開始也是晴天，但到了下午，厚厚的灰雲從北邊移過來，天氣突然變得涼很多。

sentences.en: Wednesday was the rainy day I honestly enjoy the most, because I get to stay inside and read without anyone bothering me.
sentences.zh: 星期三是雨天，老實說這是我最喜歡的一種天氣，因為我可以待在室內看書，不會有人來煩我。

sentences.en: It rained hard all morning, then the sky cleared in the afternoon and a bright rainbow appeared over the mountains to the west.
sentences.zh: 整個早上都下著大雨，下午天空放晴，一道明亮的彩虹出現在西邊的山上。

sentences.en: William ran outside without a coat to look at the rainbow and came back completely soaked, which Sophia was not thrilled about.
sentences.zh: William 沒穿外套就跑出去看彩虹，回來的時候整個人濕透了，Sophia 對這件事一點也不開心。

sentences.en: Thursday's weather report said cold air was coming from the south, but our teacher joked that in this country, cold air always seems to come from everywhere at once.
sentences.zh: 星期四的氣象報告說冷空氣要從南邊過來，但我們老師開玩笑說在這個國家，冷空氣好像永遠是從四面八方一起來的。

sentences.en: That evening it actually got cold enough that Sophia made everyone wear a jacket before dinner, even inside the house.
sentences.zh: 那天晚上真的變得很冷，Sophia 讓每個人晚餐前都穿上外套，就算是在家裡也一樣。

sentences.en: Friday was the strangest day: sunny in the morning, then a short burst of snow-like hail in the afternoon, and sunny again by evening.
sentences.zh: 星期五是最奇怪的一天：早上晴天，下午突然下了一陣像雪一樣的冰雹，到了傍晚又放晴了。

sentences.en: Nobody in our class had ever written "hail" in a weather diary before, so our teacher gave the whole class extra points for noticing it.
sentences.zh: 我們班從來沒有人在天氣日記裡寫過「冰雹」，所以老師還額外加分給全班，因為大家有注意到這件事。

sentences.en: Saturday, my weather diary simply says: rainy, cold, and perfect for staying under a blanket with a cup of hot tea.
sentences.zh: 星期六，我的天氣日記只寫了：下雨、寒冷，非常適合裹著毯子喝一杯熱茶。

sentences.en: Sunday's weather turned warm and sunny again, and Mr. Pan had asked us, during class, to think about which season each week's weather most reminded us of.
sentences.zh: 星期天的天氣又轉為溫暖晴朗，潘老師在課堂上要我們想想這一星期的天氣最像哪個季節。

sentences.en: My weather diary honestly looked like all four seasons crammed into one single week, from spring warmth to winter cold to summer sun.
sentences.zh: 老實說，我的天氣日記看起來像是把四季全部塞進了同一個星期，從春天的溫暖到冬天的寒冷再到夏天的陽光。

sentences.en: Bernice's diary for the same week just said, "weather: dramatic, exactly like me," which our teacher actually found very funny.
sentences.zh: Bernice 同一星期的日記只寫了：「天氣：很戲劇化，就跟我一樣」，我們老師覺得這句話真的很好笑。

sentences.en: At the end of the week, our teacher asked which direction most of our strange weather seemed to come from.
sentences.zh: 這星期結束時，老師問我們大部分奇怪的天氣好像都是從哪個方向來的。

sentences.en: Most of the class agreed it came from the north and the west, since those were the coldest and rainiest directions all week.
sentences.zh: 大部分同學都同意是從北邊跟西邊來的，因為這兩個方向整星期都是最冷、最多雨的。

sentences.en: I told my family about the whole project at dinner, and Sophia said old farmers could predict weather just by watching the eastern sky at sunrise.
sentences.zh: 晚餐時我跟家人說了這整個作業，Sophia 說以前的農夫只要在日出時看東邊的天空就能預測天氣。

sentences.en: William immediately asked if he could predict tomorrow's weather too, just by staring hard enough at the sky.
sentences.zh: William 馬上問他能不能也只靠盯著天空看就預測明天的天氣。

sentences.en: I told him weather does not work like magic, but he stared out the window for a full five minutes anyway, just in case.
sentences.zh: 我跟他說天氣不是靠魔法運作的，但他還是對著窗外盯了整整五分鐘，以防萬一真的可以。

quiz.question: What unusual weather event happens on Friday afternoon?
options: A short burst of snow-like hail.

quiz.question: According to Sophia, how could old farmers predict the weather?
options: By watching the eastern sky at sunrise.

quiz.question: What does Coco say her weather diary looks like by the end of the week?
options: All four seasons crammed into one week.
A week with no weather changes at all.
